seoTitle: Email Invoices Directly From QuickBooks to Customers
metaDescription: Learn how to email invoices directly from QuickBooks to customers, so bills go out faster and get paid sooner without leaving the platform.
intro: Switching between apps just to send an invoice slows down your billing cycle and delays payment. This guide covers how to email invoices to customers directly from QuickBooks, keeping the whole process — creation, customization, and delivery — in one place. It's aimed at freelancers and small business owners who want faster, more professional invoicing.

steps.heading: Find the email invoice feature
steps.body: Locate the option to email invoices within QuickBooks, typically available right after creating or opening an invoice.

steps.heading: Confirm customer contact details
steps.body: Verify the customer's email address on file is correct so the invoice reaches the right inbox.

steps.heading: Send the invoice
steps.body: Use the built-in email tool to send the invoice directly, with QuickBooks handling formatting and attachment automatically.

steps.heading: Customize the message template
steps.body: Adjust the email subject and message text so it reflects your business's tone and includes any relevant payment instructions.

steps.heading: Troubleshoot delivery issues
steps.body: If a customer doesn't receive the invoice, check for typos in the email address or ask them to check spam folders.

faq.question: Can I customize the email message sent with the invoice?
faq.answer: Yes, QuickBooks allows you to edit the subject line and body text before sending an invoice by email.

faq.question: Will customers be able to pay directly from the emailed invoice?
faq.answer: If online payment options are enabled on your account, customers can typically pay directly through a link in the email.

faq.question: What if the customer's email bounces?
faq.answer: Double-check the email address on the customer's profile and resend, or reach out to confirm their correct contact information.

faq.question: Is this feature available for recurring invoices too?
faq.answer: Yes, recurring invoices can also be set to email automatically on a schedule once configured.
